arts.ttl: Can Rashford continue his resurgence against Liverpool?
arts.sum: It was the first time on record (since 2003/04) that Liverpool failed to register a single attempt in a half of football at Anfield, losing that second-half shot count 10-0. Based on his first half of competitive action in a Villa shirt, it looks as if Marcus Rashford is going to enjoy playing for Emery’s side.
